features.name: Summoning Banners
features.notes: Now routes to a playable summon screen with premium shard exchange, banner-specific currencies, pity tracking, and duplicate-copy merge growth layered on top of the roster model.

features.name: Guilds
features.notes: Reserved for async cooperative progression, contribution logs, and shared boss state layered on top of existing player power and campaign progress.

features.name: Limited Events
features.primary_surface: Home event rail and event route
features.notes: Now routes to a playable limited-time event screen with point sources, milestone claims, event-exclusive stages, save-backed progression, and a linked summon-banner handoff.

features.name: PvP Ladder
features.notes: Uses the same five-slot formation payloads and battle summaries so asynchronous defense snapshots can plug into the current combat pipeline.

features.name: Quest Board
features.notes: Now routes to a playable milestone board that tracks battle wins, stage clears, AFK claims, hero upgrades, and summons through explicit gameplay signals.
